What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a dark suit jacket and light blue shirt sits on the left side of a curved news desk, gesturing with his hands while speaking. A woman with long blonde hair in a dark blue dress sits on the right side, smiling and looking towards him. White papers and a tablet rest on the glossy desk surface, while a large screen behind displays abstract red and blue graphics.

Describe the sequence of actions performed by the man in the suit and the appearance of the co-anchor throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the man in the suit looks down at the desk with hands resting; at 4s, he turns his head towards his right; at 6s, a woman in a blue dress appears beside him as he gestures with his right hand; at 8s, he points his left index finger while speaking; at 10s, the woman smiles while looking towards him.
